notes: Angular SPA with Material Design components. Shadow DOM encapsulation on many components makes selector-based discovery unreliable. Component demos include forms, buttons, menus, dialogs — all rendered dynamically. Sidebar navigation is an Angular Router outlet. Code examples toggle between source and rendered output. Extreme difficulty from Shadow DOM boundaries, dynamic Angular rendering, and nested component hierarchies.

endpoints.label: Search Components
endpoints.description: Search input for filtering component list

endpoints.label: Component Navigation
endpoints.description: Sidebar component list, top navigation bar, and component tab sections for browsing Angular Material docs

endpoints.label: Interactive Demos
endpoints.description: Interactive form demos, code example toggles, and theme switcher
